translations.If the savings module is enabled, users: If the savings module is enabled, users will see the savings option in their menu.
translations.When the module is enabled, all users’ s: When the module is enabled, all users’ states are reset to 0.
translations.If the absences module is enabled, users: If the absences module is enabled, users will see the absences option in their menu.
translations.If you change the file manager user afte: If you change the file manager user after it has already been set, file loss may occur. Consider making a backup before proceeding.

translations.Select the period and request type: Select the period and request type
translations.This request has not been answered yet: This request has not been answered yet
translations.You can now request your savings!: You can now request your savings!
translations.Request up to {percent} of your accumula: Request up to {percent} of your accumulated Savings Fund balance, considering both the employee and employer contributions.
translations.Your request has been sent, please wait: Your request has been sent, please wait for a response.
Your profile is in read-only mode.
translations.On June 30th, the deposit corresponding: On June 30th, the deposit corresponding to the Savings Fund Loan will be made. This loan does not accrue interest.
translations.The available amount may be up to {perce: The available amount may be up to {percent} of the total accumulated to date, considering both the worker and the employer contributions.
translations.In this form, the amount must be entered: In this form, the amount must be entered in pesos. If you wish to request a specific percentage, you can indicate it in the notes field.
translations.Carefully verify the information before: Carefully verify the information before submitting your request, as it cannot be canceled or modified.
translations.I authorize to deduct from my savings th: I authorize to deduct from my savings the corresponding amount according to the loan conditions.

translations.An error occurred {error}, please report: An error occurred {error}, please report to the administrator
translations.Are you sure you want to disable the acc: Are you sure you want to disable the account?
translations.As an administrator, you can request or: As an administrator, you can request or assign an absence for the selected employee
translations.You cannot request more days than availa: You cannot request more days than available.
translations.You are registering an absence in admin: You are registering an absence in admin mode. Notifications and automatic messages will remain active, and the corresponding days will be deducted from the selected employee.
translations.It is necessary to upload a file to just: It is necessary to upload a file to justify your absence.
translations.Drop files here or click to select: Drop files here or click to select
translations.Add a comment to your request (OPTIONAL): Add a comment to your request (OPTIONAL)
translations.This table shows how many vacation days: This table shows how many vacation days you are entitled to based on your years with the company. It is a guide based on the Federal Labor Law, reformed in 2023.
translations.Check this table every time you reach a: Check this table every time you reach a work anniversary. That way you can plan your time off in advance and enjoy your days to the fullest.
translations.From when do I have the right to vacatio: From when do I have the right to vacation?
translations.From your first full year worked you can: From your first full year worked you can already take vacation. The minimum is 12 days and it increases each year.
translations.The days shown in the table are business: The days shown in the table are business days. Saturdays, Sundays, and holidays are not counted.
translations.Yes. By law, at least half should be tak: Yes. By law, at least half should be taken consecutively, but you can talk to Human Resources to distribute the days according to your needs and your team’s.
translations.What happens if I do not take my vacatio: What happens if I do not take my vacation?
translations.Unused vacation is not lost, but it is i: Unused vacation is not lost, but it is important to use it. Resting is a right and also helps your health and performance.
translations.If you do not take your vacation, it is: If you do not take your vacation, it is lost. It is important to use it to take care of your health and wellbeing.
translations.Can I ask for more vacation days?: Can I ask for more vacation days?
translations.Yes, although the legal amount is the mi: Yes, although the legal amount is the minimum, the company may offer more days as an additional benefit. Check your contract or talk to HR.
translations.The module is in read-only mode: The module is in read-only mode
translations.This module is in read-only mode: This module is in read-only mode
translations.You cannot request absences on past date: You cannot request absences on past dates
translations.You cannot start or end your absence on: You cannot start or end your absence on a weekend
